agent_summaries.role_description: Internal inventory, budget, and warehouse capacity analysis via log-linear sales velocity detection.
agent_summaries.findings_summary: Identified 23 viral SKUs with exponential sales growth (slope>0.15, R2>0.9) from 237 total SKUs. Calculated exact remaining budget of 31,047,680 TND and available capacity of 324.669 m3 after accounting for 87.45M TND and 1,675.331 m3 already tied in slow stock.

agent_summaries.role_description: Digital trend validation using internal scraper data and live web search cross-referencing.
agent_summaries.findings_summary: Validated Gorpcore, Olive Cargo, Quiet Luxury as still relevant and Mesh Layering as emerging micro-trend with 2-week lead time. Y2K Revival flagged as cooling/late-cycle and correctly excluded from procurement recommendations.

agent_summaries.role_description: Competitor stock-out and pricing gap analysis across TunisTech, SousseStyle, and MedinaModa.
agent_summaries.findings_summary: Found 46.7% overall competitor OOS rate on trending items, with critical 66.7% OOS on SKU-1156, SKU-1210, SKU-1233, SKU-1289. Competitor price markups of 4-16% above our ERP cost confirm exploitable supply gaps for prioritized restock.

recommendations.name: Dresses - Quiet Luxury
recommendations.reasoning: Viral SKU with exponential velocity in Quiet Luxury trend; competitor OOS gap and validated relevance justify restock within budget and capacity.

recommendations.name: Tops - Quiet Luxury
recommendations.reasoning: Viral SKU with exponential velocity in Quiet Luxury trend; competitor OOS gap and validated relevance justify restock within budget and capacity.

recommendations.reasoning: Viral SKU with exponential velocity in Mesh Layering trend; competitor OOS gap and validated relevance justify restock within budget and capacity.
